description.content: Evidence is an open-source (MIT) business-intelligence-as-code framework that compiles SQL + Markdown into a static data app via a Node CLI and a DuckDB-WASM Universal SQL query layer. It is not a hosted REST API, so this collection contains no executable HTTP requests - only documentation reference links. See https://docs.evidence.dev/ and https://docs.evidence.dev/reference/cli.
Reference links to the Evidence framework, CLI, and Universal SQL query layer. Evidence exposes no REST endpoints.

request.description: Core documentation for the Evidence SQL + Markdown framework (informational link, not an API call).
CLI reference (dev, build, preview, sources) - the framework interface in place of a REST API (informational link).
The in-process query engine that runs SQL against data sources extracted to Parquet (informational link).
